default_body.markdown:
## FuryMC Launcher v0.1.0 Release

This is the first proper release of FuryMC Launcher. Expect it to have bugs. It includes all features from Zalith Launcher 2 v2.4.4, with the exception of official Minecraft login (which will be added in future updates).

### Changes:
- Synced with Zalith Launcher 2 v2.4.4 core.
- Re-added Offline Login capabilities.
- Refined About screen with Discord links.
- Purged sensitive data and fixed CurseForge API integration.

### 🤖 AI Assistance
This project is mostly developed and maintained with the help of AI assistance.
I am sorry that I use AI to do most of the work, but I reassure you that I will try my best to not mess anything up and be as helpful as possible.
